title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Hubtown

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Hubtown
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
